title: Decree-Law No. 37 of 2025 Amending Article 161 of the Central Bank of Bahrain and Financial Institutions Law
summary: Increases enforcement risk for unlicensed regulated financial services, including crypto-asset and virtual-asset services where they fall within CBB-regulated activities, by amending penalty provisions under the CBB law.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Strengthens sanctions for unlicensed regulated financial services.
theme_notes.digital_finance.virtual_assets: Strengthens sanctions for unlicensed regulated financial services.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Law No. 64 of 2006 and supports enforcement of the Crypto-Asset Module and Stablecoin Issuance and Offering Module
